description_long: This is a stylized doll with a cartoonish appearance, featuring a large round head, oversized black eyes, and a wide, simple smile. The doll has voluminous, medium-brown hair with two prominent tufts at the top and a green headband at the back. Its body is minimalist and black, with stick-like arms and legs, and it wears a large black bow tie. The hands are mismatched in color, with one black and one white, adding a playful asymmetry. The feet are rounded, and the overall design is whimsical, making it suitable for playful or decorative use in urban environments.
description: A cartoonish doll with a large head, brown hair, black bow tie, and mismatched black and white hands. Its minimalist body and oversized features give it a playful, whimsical look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large face, black eyes, wide smile, black bow tie, and outstretched arms with one black and one white hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the volume and layered texture of the brown hair, as well as the profile of the head and the protruding arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the voluminous brown hair, the green headband, and the simple black body with both hands visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's shape and the side profile of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_style: Minimalist cartoon style with a large black bow tie; no visible garments or patterns, emphasizing a playful, stylized look.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with a wide, curved mouth, large black eyes, and no visible eyebrows, giving a cheerful and friendly appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, voluminous brown hair with two prominent tufts at the top and a green headband at the back.
